data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Microsoft employs a microservices architecture to enhance scalability and maintainability of its services.
data.technical_spec: Independently deployable services communicating via APIs.

data.title: Cloud-Native Design
data.description: The site leverages Azure cloud infrastructure for robust performance and reliability.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes containers, serverless functions, and managed databases.

data.title: Responsive Design
data.description: The layout of microsoft.com adjusts seamlessly across various device sizes.
data.technical_spec: CSS media queries, flexible grids, and responsive images.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: A CDN is used to distribute static and dynamic content efficiently across global users.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Azure CDN for caching and reducing latency.

data.title: Progressive Web Application (PWA)
data.description: Enhances user experience with PWA capabilities for offline usability.
data.technical_spec: Service workers and web application manifest are implemented.
